violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. - Serve Safe is expired.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Tube of ground meat on floor in walk-in freezer.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. - Food in the walk-in cooler not stored properly. Raw meat next to bag of shredded lettuce on same shelf.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - RTE food items in the walk in refrigerator are not labeled with a date produced or use by date.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Wire racks in the walk-in refrigerator rusty.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Vent hood filters require cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Walls and ceiling throughout require repairs. Wall in the main dining area looks to have water damage.
Contaminated food disposition. — --Contaminated ready-to-eat food * was not discarded as required. - Moldy food items found in the refrigerator not discarded.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item * stored in an unapproved location. - Food items both raw and RTE are being stored in a refrigerator that is dirty and has bacterial growth on the walls and racks.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food * was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food *. - Food in the walk-in cooler not stored properly. Raw meat above tea and potatoes. Shell eggs over biscuits and vegetables.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - RTE food items in the walk in refrigerator are not labeled with a date produced or use by date.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil * was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Wire racks in the walk-in refrigerator rusty

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Wire racks in the walk-in have mold and dust on them--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent hood filters require cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. - Walls and ceiling throughout require repairs. wall in the main dining area looks to have water damage. Ceiling panels hanging off the ceiling in the kitchen.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge * did not hold an approved food service manager certificate. - Serve Safe is expired.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
